core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix utility with warmth.
Content is King: Data must be legible and beautiful.
Negative Space: Generous padding for a 'premium' feel.
Contrast: High contrast for accessibility and hierarchy.

colors.gradients: NONE. Use solid colors for a clean, professional look.

layout_strategies.card_style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
layout_strategies.sidebar: w-64 bg-slate-900 text-white h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 overflow-y-auto z-50

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-800 text-white shadow-sm rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 border border-red-200 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all

components.inputs: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 rounded-lg h-11 px-4
components.cards: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm p-6
components.tables: w-full text-sm text-left text-slate-600 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-slate-200

status_badges.active: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.pending: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.inactive: bg-slate-100 text-slate-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Manrope'.
Do NOT use gradients. Stick to solid, confident colors.
Use 2-3x more padding than usual. White space is luxury.
All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute.
Authentication pages should look premium, not just a form on a gray background.

technical_instructions.charts: Use Shadcn Charts (Recharts wrapper). Bar charts for attendance, Line charts for fee trends.
technical_instructions.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'filled' style for active states if possible, else stroke.
technical_instructions.date_handling: Use 'date-fns' for formatting. Display dates as 'dd MMM yyyy' (e.g., 12 Oct 2023).
technical_instructions.tables: Use Shadcn Table component. Implement pagination for > 10 rows.
